## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7480da94040c249ce1daeb830fed566f45fefa4f32050ad25d691d7c71f28a96)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'repo-typescript-config' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
